item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 31 Mar 2026
item.description:
1. Improve signature-help feature in Merlin
  2. Feedback Wanted: Upcoming OCaml Users Survey 2026 Questions
  3. OCaml Users Survey 2023 Results
  4. ortac-0.8 specification-driven testing with Domains
  5. Third alpha release for OCaml 5.5.0
  6. ocaml-openapi-gen 0.1.0, ocaml-forgejo
  7. CS6868 Concurrent Programming -- Course Materials
  8. libinput - OCaml bindings for Linux input devices
  9. OCaml compiler office hours
